title: Bloom Energy Reports Record First Quarter 2026 Results and Raises Full Year 2026 Guidance
text: Bloom Energy reported record first quarter 2026 results demonstrating exceptional growth and operational progress. Q1 2026 revenue reached $751.05 million, representing 130.4% year-over-year growth from $326.0 million in Q1 2025. Non-GAAP EPS of $0.44 substantially exceeded analyst consensus of $0.10. Product revenue increased 208.4% year-over-year to $653.3 million, representing the strongest product revenue quarter in company history. Services revenue grew 18.7% year-over-year to $97.8 million. Gross margin improved to 31.5%, up 280 basis points annually. Net income swung to $70.65 million profit from prior-year loss position. Operating cash flow reached $73.6 million, achieving positive quarterly operating cash flow for the first time in Q1. The company raised 2026 full-year revenue guidance to $3.4-$3.8 billion from prior guidance range, representing approximately 80% year-over-year growth at midpoint. Non-GAAP gross margin guidance is approximately 34%. Non-GAAP operating income guidance is $600-$750 million. Non-GAAP fully diluted EPS guidance is $1.85-$2.25. Total company backlog reached approximately $20 billion, comprising $6 billion in product orders and $14 billion in service contracts, representing strong future revenue visibility.
